text: Nowadays, numerous scientific studies rely on new artificial intelligence models because of their convenience and the fact that sometimes you don’t have to leave home to buy groceries. The recent evolution of scientific literature and technology made the work of researchers and policymakers easier, which is why the new ChatGPT artificial intelligence model of OpenAI has revolutionized the field of artificial intelligence. The model created by OpenAI was used and tested by numerous entities in various fields of study to assess its performance in chat mode. In this paper we refer to the capabilities of ChatGPT and the challenges that users – researchers, policymakers – still encounter.
